name: Yixuan
description:
MOMMY YIXUAN IS HERE LETS GO!

I'm making this bot public for yall guys because I put a lot of work and effort into it (I worked on it for a week(4k tokens per personality(pls give it a try))). MORE TOKENS, MORE POWER!!!

I made a small first message for a reason, first of all to save some tokens, and second it is so that you can be free to do whatever you want. Since freedom is one of the most important thing for a person, I guess.

Habe fun!

Special thanks to those who asked me to add proxies, if it weren't for you guys, I probably would never have added proxies to my bots and they would have been bad. Thank you all, love you, see you again!
creator: Skiart
